items.title: Fireworks, flyovers and a 'really long' Trump speech ahead as US celebrates 250th
items.summary: The celebrations in the US capital will feature 850,000 fireworks, a "really long" speech from the president and scorching temperatures.

items.title: Brutal heat cancels Fourth of July events, from DC to Philadelphia
items.summary: More than 165 million people are enduring dangerous heat and humidity, with temperatures expected to stay at 38C (100F) for several days.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back

items.title: 歷經美、以軍事夾擊 專家：伊朗新領導層更加大膽且自信
items.summary: 儘管美國總統川普屢次聲稱在軍事上徹底擊潰伊朗，並使德黑蘭高層轉向配合華盛頓要求的溫和、務實立場，但專家和安全官員認為，在歷時數個月的劇烈軍事壓力下倖存，反倒鞏固了德黑蘭的強硬派...…
